themeWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
palm tree; the name of Judah’s daughter-in-law

sentenceTheme: Judah’s family scandal with Tamar leads to the birth of Pharez and Zarah, advancing the Messianic line.

verses.text: And it came to pass at that time, that Judah went down from his brethren, and turned in to a certain Adullamite, whose name was Hirah.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
an inhabitant or native of Adullam

verses.text: And Judah saw there a daughter of a certain Canaanite, whose name was Shuah; and he took her, and went in unto her.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
a Canaanite; by extension, a merchant or trader

verses.text: And she conceived, and bare a son; and he called his name Er.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
watchful; the name of Judah’s firstborn

verses.text: And she conceived again, and bare a son; and she called his name Onan.

highlightedWords.meaning: son; descendant; member of a group
vigorous; the name of Judah’s second son

verses.text: And she yet again conceived, and bare a son; and called his name Shelah: and he was at Chezib, when she bare him.

highlightedWords.meaning: petition; the name of Judah’s third son
deception; a place in Judah (also called Achzib)

verses.text: And Judah took a wife for Er his firstborn, whose name was Tamar.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
palm tree; the name of Judah’s daughter-in-law

verses.text: And Er, Judah's firstborn, was wicked in the sight of the LORD; and the LORD slew him.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of Israel’s God; the LORD
to die; to put to death; to kill

verses.text: And Judah said unto Onan, Go in unto thy brother's wife, and marry her, and raise up seed to thy brother.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
seed; offspring; descendants

verses.text: And Onan knew that the seed should not be his; and it came to pass, when he went in unto his brother's wife, that he spilled it on the ground, lest that he should give seed to his brother.

highlightedWords.meaning: vigorous; the name of Judah’s second son
seed; offspring; descendants

verses.text: And the thing which he did displeased the LORD: wherefore he slew him also.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of Israel’s God; the LORD
to die; to put to death; to kill

verses.text: Then said Judah to Tamar his daughter in law, Remain a widow at thy father's house, till Shelah my son be grown: for he said, Lest peradventure he die also, as his brethren did. And Tamar went and dwelt in her father's house.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
palm tree; the name of Judah’s daughter-in-law

verses.text: And in process of time the daughter of Shuah Judah's wife died; and Judah was comforted, and went up unto his sheepshearers to Timnath, he and his friend Hirah the Adullamite.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
allotted portion; a town in Judah

verses.text: And it was told Tamar, saying, Behold thy father in law goeth up to Timnath to shear his sheep.

highlightedWords.meaning: palm tree; the name of Judah’s daughter-in-law
allotted portion; a town in Judah

verses.text: And she put her widow's garments off from her, and covered her with a vail, and wrapped herself, and sat in an open place, which is by the way to Timnath; for she saw that Shelah was grown, and she was not given unto him to wife.

highlightedWords.meaning: allotted portion; a town in Judah
petition; the name of Judah’s third son

verses.text: When Judah saw her, he thought her to be an harlot; because she had covered her face.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
to commit fornication; a prostitute

verses.text: And he turned unto her by the way, and said, Go to, I pray thee, let me come in unto thee; for he knew not that she was his daughter in law. And she said, What wilt thou give me, that thou mayest come in unto me?

highlightedWords.meaning: way; road; path; manner
to give; put; set; grant

verses.text: And he said, I will send thee a kid from the flock. And she said, Wilt thou give me a pledge, till thou send it?

highlightedWords.meaning: a young goat
a pledge; security; earnest

verses.text: And he said, What pledge shall I give thee? And she said, Thy signet, and thy bracelets, and thy staff that is in thine hand. And he gave it her, and came in unto her, and she conceived by him.

highlightedWords.meaning: a seal; signet
a staff; rod; tribe

verses.text: And she arose, and went away, and laid by her vail from her, and put on the garments of her widowhood.

highlightedWords.meaning: veil; wrapper; shawl
garment; clothing; raiment

verses.text: And Judah sent the kid by the hand of his friend the Adullamite, to receive his pledge from the woman's hand: but he found her not.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
a pledge; security; earnest

verses.text: Then he asked the men of that place, saying, Where is the harlot, that was openly by the way side? And they said, There was no harlot in this place.

highlightedWords.meaning: a consecrated (temple) prostitute
way; road; path; manner

verses.text: And he returned to Judah, and said, I cannot find her; and also the men of the place said, that there was no harlot in this place.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
a consecrated (temple) prostitute

verses.text: And Judah said, Let her take it to her, lest we be shamed: behold, I sent this kid, and thou hast not found her.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
a young goat

verses.text: And it came to pass about three months after, that it was told Judah, saying, Tamar thy daughter in law hath played the harlot; and also, behold, she is with child by whoredom. And Judah said, Bring her forth, and let her be burnt.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
to burn; consume with fire

verses.text: When she was brought forth, she sent to her father in law, saying, By the man, whose these are, am I with child: and she said, Discern, I pray thee, whose are these, the signet, and bracelets, and staff.

highlightedWords.meaning: a seal; signet
cord; string; lace

verses.text: And Judah acknowledged them, and said, She hath been more righteous than I; because that I gave her not to Shelah my son. And he knew her again no more.

highlightedWords.meaning: praised; the name of Jacob’s fourth son and the tribe descended from him
righteous; just; in the right

verses.text: And it came to pass in the time of her travail, that, behold, twins were in her womb.

highlightedWords.meaning: twins
belly; womb

verses.text: And it came to pass, when she travailed, that the one put out his hand: and the midwife took and bound upon his hand a scarlet thread, saying, This came out first.

highlightedWords.meaning: scarlet; crimson
thread; line; cord

verses.text: And it came to pass, as he drew back his hand, that, behold, his brother came out: and she said, How hast thou broken forth? this breach be upon thee: therefore his name was called Pharez.

highlightedWords.meaning: a breach; breaking forth
breach; the name of Judah’s son

verses.text: And afterward came out his brother, that had the scarlet thread upon his hand: and his name was called Zarah.

highlightedWords.meaning: scarlet; crimson
rising; dawn; the name of Judah’s son (also spelled Zerah)
